name: AMD
rationale: Open a starter in AMD. It is the cleanest momentum name in the watchlist (1W 6.20%, 1M 12.22%, 3M 122.07% in the state feed) and has a dated catalyst: AMD's Advancing AI 2026 event is set for July 23, 2026, with fiscal Q2 2026 results scheduled for August 4 after the close.
